name: protocol-to-synthetic-sdtm
description: Bounded-AI skills for the protocol-to-synthetic-SDTM pipeline: extract a USDM v3.0 representation from a ClinicalTrials.gov record + protocol SoA, and match USDM activities to CDISC Biomedical Concepts. Both return constrained JSON and emit a *.review.json HITL checkpoint.
